caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing 21 kt winds with a 58% rain probability and 5.7 ft wave heights, while St. Thomas is seeing similar conditions with 21 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, making them the top impacted ports in the Eastern Caribbean today. I expect these conditions to persist with dominant swell direction from the east and a swell period of 8 s, affecting maritime activities in the region.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Mediterranean Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing less than 10% rain probability with max wave height of 3.6 ft and dominant swell direction from the W. Lisbon is also seeing calm conditions with 0 kt max wind and less than 10% rain probability, similar to Cadiz.
